## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Kyle's role at GrowthX and explore potential collaboration opportunities with Elias's company.](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation services with a focus on high-quality, strategic content for SEO and other channels](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Elias is exploring various content and SEO strategies for his company, including potential use of AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [GrowthX's offering may be more comprehensive but also more expensive than other options Elias is considering](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [There's potential for further discussion on how GrowthX could support Elias's content needs](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Services

  - [Started as an AI-driven content creation service, now offering both services and software](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Developed hundreds of AI-driven workflows for content creation, research, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, strategic content that passes technical and legal reviews](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Price range: $9,000 - $25,000+ per month, depending on client needs](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Typical output: \~15 pieces of editorial content per week, plus programmatic content and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Technology

  - [Begins with deep strategy work, including persona development and content style guides](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Uses a proprietary platform with AI-driven workflows for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Features include fact-checking, internal linking, meta tag generation, and image creation](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Emphasizes human oversight and editing throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Can create custom workflows and content experiences (e.g., interactive tools) for clients](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

### Elias's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Recently came out of stealth mode, Elias is the only full-time marketing employee](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Working with various contractors and agencies for website development, paid advertising, and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Exploring AI tools like TeamGPT for content creation and considering a tool called Quarter for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Potential Collaboration Ideas

  - [Elias expressed interest in GrowthX's platform and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of a hybrid model where Elias's team could use GrowthX's platform](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Elias to attend upcoming GrowthX workshop on August 1st to learn more about their approach](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send information about upcoming GrowthX workshop on August 1st](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Kyle to provide Marcel's opinion on Quarter (competitor tool Elias is considering)](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Elias to review additional information from Kyle and consider potential collaboration options](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=2334.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion to be scheduled to explore collaboration possibilities further](https://fathom.video/share/DTYR_-8bD7n7pm_83Qx69dfUV94sxe9-?tab=summary&timestamp=2350.0)
